mercy-lyrics.title: Have Mercy on Me
mercy-lyrics.artist: Written by Anthony and sang and produced by Suno
mercy-lyrics.lyrics:
I'm tired of the sleepless nights
Tired of this emptiness inside
Tired of the sorrow sitting heavy on my chest
Tired of feeling so alone
I try to smile, I try to pretend
But everyone else looks happy in the end
I reach for people but they turn away
And I'm left here with the weight

I know You were rejected too
I know You carried pain You never deserved
But Lord, I'm so ashamed of who I've been
I can't even lift my head

Have mercy on me
I'm too weak to lift my head
Have mercy on me
I've failed You again and again
I don't deserve to speak Your name
I don't deserve to look at You
But I'm breaking, Lord, I'm breaking
Have mercy on me

I feel the guilt of all my past
The things I did, the lines I crossed
I struggle just to do what's right
And I'm scared I'm too far gone to fight
My soul aches and my body's worn
I worry all day and can't sleep when it's dark
I wonder if I'm too old to change
If this heart is just too stained

I know You were rejected too
You know what it's like to be cast aside
So Jesus, if You're listening now
Please don't turn away tonight

Have mercy on me
I'm too weak to lift my head
Have mercy on me
I've failed You again and again
I don't deserve to speak Your name
I don't deserve to look at You
But I'm breaking, Lord, I'm breaking
Have mercy on me

How did You carry all our trouble?
How did You bear what we deserved?
I come with nothing but my shame
And still I'm hoping You'll let me in
I'm tired of pretending I'm okay
I'm tired of hiding in the dark
I don't have the strength to fix myself
So I'm laying here with my broken heart

Have mercy on me…
I'm too weak to lift my head
Have mercy on me…
I've failed You again and again
Even if I'm too far gone
Even if I'm too ashamed
Lord, I'm reaching in the darkness
Have mercy on me

Have mercy… have mercy…
I'm too weak… but I'm here
Have mercy on me

here-lyrics.title: Here I Am, Lord
here-lyrics.artist: Written by Anthony and sang and produced by Suno
here-lyrics.lyrics:
Father in heaven, 
God of all creation,  
How worthy and holy is Your name.  
You are the Sovereign King above all kings,  
The Author of life who spoke the stars into being.  
Your ways are higher than my ways,  
Your thoughts are deeper than my thoughts.  
I stand in awe of Your glory  
And bow my heart before Your throne.  

Here I am, Lord — I come to serve You.  
I lay down my pride, my will, and my way. 
Take all of me, I surrender completely,
Let Your will be done in my life today.
Here I am, Lord — I am Yours. 

When my flesh rises up and pride whispers for control,  
Remind me that You are Lord of all.  
When my desires pull me toward comfort and ease,  
Give me courage to follow where You lead.  
I choose to trust Your perfect sovereignty,
And rest in Your mercy that covers me.
Your Word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path,
Write Your law upon my heart.

Here I am, Lord — I come to serve You.  
I lay down my pride, my will, and my way. 
Take all of me, I surrender completely,
Let Your will be done in my life today.
Here I am, Lord — I am Yours. 
 
Use my hands to do Your work,
My voice to speak Your truth,
My life as a living offering of worship.
Even when the path is hidden or the way is hard,
I will not lean on my own understanding —
I acknowledge You in all my ways.

Here I am, Lord — send me where You will.
I am Your servant, ready to be poured out.
Body, mind, and spirit, I belong to You still,
Here I am, Lord — I am Yours. 
Here I am, Lord — I am Yours. 

Here I am, Lord — I am Yours.
Here I am, Lord — I am Yours.
